D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

Slicing xyY

slide the luminance and watch the displayable colours at that Y trace an ever-changing island on the chart

xyY splits colour into chromaticity (x, y) and luminance (Y). A horizontal cut at one Y exposes every colour of that brightness a screen can actually show.

Slide the luminance Y. The filled island is the sRGB gamut at that brightness inside the spectral horseshoe; the side profile marks where the slice sits in the colour solid. Watch it bulge at mid Y and pinch toward black and white.
